name: io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.ArtifactRepositoryRefStatus
description: ArtifactRepositoryRefStatus is the resolved artifact repository reference with namespace io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.

artifactRepository.description: The repository the workflow will use. This maybe empty before v3.1.

configMap.description: The name of the config map. Defaults to "artifact-repositories".

default.description: If this ref represents the default artifact repository, rather than a config map.

key.description: The config map key. Defaults to the value of the "workflows.argoproj.io/default-artifact-repository" annotation.

namespace.description: The namespace of the config map. Defaults to the workflow's namespace, or the controller's namespace (if found).
